otlpEndpoint.description: OTLP HTTP endpoint for trace export. Falls back to AGENTWEAVE_OTLP_ENDPOINT env var, then http://localhost:4318

agentId.description: Agent identifier for main sessions. Falls back to AGENTWEAVE_AGENT_ID env var, then 'nix-v1'

subagentId.description: Agent identifier for isolated/sub-agent sessions (agent:isolated:* format). Defaults to '{agentId}-subagent-v1'

project.description: Project name for span attribution. Falls back to AGENTWEAVE_PROJECT env var

proxyUrl.description: AgentWeave proxy URL injected as ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL, OPENAI_BASE_URL, and OPENAI_API_BASE for sub-agents (with trailing /v1 stripped). Falls back to AGENTWEAVE_PROXY_URL env var
